code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
for w in words
  let head_opt = string.byte_at(w, 0)
  let new_word = match head_opt
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let upper = b - 32
      let rest = string.substring(w, 1, string.len(w))
      "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
    else
      w
    end
  when None
    w
  end
  if first
    result = new_word
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{new_word}"
  end
end
println(result)
